mapper.select: SELECT p.project_id AS "projectId", p.project_name AS "projectName", p.location AS "location", p.contract_amount AS "contractAmount", p.status AS "status", p.description AS "description", TO_CHAR(p.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(p.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", p.client_name AS "clientName", p.manager_name AS "managerName", COUNT(t.task_id) AS "taskCount", TO_CHAR(p.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM wbs_project p LEFT JOIN wbs_task t ON t.wbs_project_id = p.project_id GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_name, p.location, p.contract_amount, p.status, p.description, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.client_name, p.manager_name, p.created_at ORDER BY p.created_at ASC

SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", location AS "location", contract_amount AS "contractAmount", status AS "status", description AS "description", TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", client_name AS "clientName", manager_name AS "managerName", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM wbs_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE wbs_project SET project_name = #{projectName}, location = #{location}, contract_amount = #{contractAmount}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, start_date = NULLIF(#{startDate}, '')::DATE, end_date = NULLIF(#{endDate}, '')::DATE, client_name = #{clientName}, manager_name = #{managerName}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS "taskId", wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", wbs_code AS "wbsCode", task_name AS "taskName", TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", duration AS "duration", progress AS "progress", predecessor_ids AS "predecessorIds", status AS "status", responsible AS "responsible", notes AS "notes", source AS "source", sort_order AS "sortOrder", parent_task_id AS "parentTaskId", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM wbs_task WHERE wbs_project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT t.task_id AS "taskId", t.wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", p.project_name AS "projectName", t.wbs_code AS "wbsCode", t.task_name AS "taskName", TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", t.duration AS "duration", t.progress AS "progress", t.predecessor_ids AS "predecessorIds", t.status AS "status", t.responsible AS "responsible", t.notes AS "notes", t.source AS "source", t.sort_order AS "sortOrder", t.parent_task_id AS "parentTaskId" FROM wbs_task t JOIN wbs_project p ON p.project_id = t.wbs_project_id ORDER BY p.project_id ASC, t.sort_order ASC, t.created_at ASC

SELECT task_id AS "taskId", wbs_project_id AS "wbsProjectId", wbs_code AS "wbsCode", task_name AS "taskName", TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", duration AS "duration", progress AS "progress", predecessor_ids AS "predecessorIds", status AS "status", responsible AS "responsible", notes AS "notes", source AS "source", sort_order AS "sortOrder", parent_task_id AS "parentTaskId" FROM wbs_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wbs_task ( task_id, wbs_project_id, wbs_code, task_name, start_date, end_date, duration, progress, predecessor_ids, status, responsible, notes, source, sort_order, parent_task_id ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{wbsProjectId}, #{wbsCode}, #{taskName}, NULLIF(#{startDate}, '')::DATE, NULLIF(#{endDate}, '')::DATE, #{duration}, #{progress}, #{predecessorIds}, #{status}, #{responsible}, #{notes}, #{source}, #{sortOrder}, #{parentTaskId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wbs_task SET wbs_code = #{wbsCode}, task_name = #{taskName}, start_date = NULLIF(#{startDate}, '')::DATE, end_date = NULLIF(#{endDate}, '')::DATE, duration = #{duration}, progress = #{progress}, predecessor_ids = #{predecessorIds}, status = #{status}, responsible = #{responsible}, notes = #{notes}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO wbs_task ( task_id, wbs_project_id, wbs_code, task_name, start_date, end_date, duration, progress, predecessor_ids, status, responsible, notes, source, sort_order, parent_task_id )
SELECT #{t.taskId}, #{t.wbsProjectId}, #{t.wbsCode}, #{t.taskName}, NULLIF(#{t.startDate}, '')::DATE, NULLIF(#{t.endDate}, '')::DATE, #{t.duration}, #{t.progress}, #{t.predecessorIds}, #{t.status}, #{t.responsible}, #{t.notes}, #{t.source}, #{t.sortOrder}, #{t.parentTaskId}
